rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'roles' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/roles/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The documentation and codebase are aligned regarding the 'roles' entity, either by introducing a new module under src/modules/roles/ or by removing the entity from the domain model.

constraints: RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
outOfScope: Implementation of RBAC logic within the new module if introduced
